readFailed.title: Read Failed
readFailed.subtitle: Check passport placement and try again

import.title: Import Manifest File
import.dropZone: Drop Excel file here or click to select

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.hint: Press {{combo}} anytime to toggle this dialog

scan2.shortcutsHint: F1: Scan | F5: Reset | Esc: Clear

settings.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear ALL session data? This will permanently wipe the manifest and scan history.

help.shipName: Name of the vessel for this voyage. Appears on printed reports.
help.autoReset: Seconds before the scan screen resets automatically after each read. Lower values suit high-throughput lines.
help.scanMode: How the passport reader sends data to the app: keyboard emulation for basic devices, or direct API connection for Regula or Penta hardware.
help.retention: How many days to keep scan records before they are automatically deleted. Min 1, max 365 days.
help.regulaUrl: Network address of the Regula device service. Default: http://localhost:8080
help.regulaPoll: How often (in milliseconds) to query the Regula device. Lower = faster response but higher CPU usage.
help.pentaUrl: Network address of the Penta (DESKO) device service. Default: http://localhost:8085
help.pentaPoll: How often (in milliseconds) to query the Penta device. Lower = faster response but higher CPU usage.
help.sound: Play audio feedback on successful scans, warnings, and errors.
help.clearSession: Permanently deletes the current voyage, all manifest data, scan history, and boarding records. This cannot be undone.
help.apiServerEnabled: When enabled, the app listens for incoming MRZ data from external devices like Regula.
help.apiServerPort: TCP port the API server listens on.. Restart required on change.

apiServer.title: API Server (Regula Import)
apiServer.description: Accepts incoming MRZ data from Regula or other devices via HTTP on 127.0.0.1.
